text.value:
TRUNCATE TABLE [wh_silver].[dbo].[game_session];
INSERT INTO [wh_silver].[dbo].[game_session] (
    session_id,
    city_id,
    session_start_ts,
    session_end_ts,
    session_duration_sec,
    session_status,
    session_result,
    difficulty_at_start,
    nb_hints_requested,
    nb_hints_shown,
    event_source,
    is_simulated
)
SELECT
    session_id,
    MAX(city_id) AS city_id,
    MIN(event_ts) AS session_start_ts,
    MAX(event_ts) AS session_end_ts,
    DATEDIFF(SECOND, MIN(event_ts), MAX(event_ts)) AS session_duration_sec,
    CASE
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_type = 'abandoned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'abandoned'
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_type = 'session_ended' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'completed'
        ELSE 'in_progress'
    END AS session_status,
    MAX(session_result) AS session_result,
    MAX(CASE 
        WHEN event_type = 'session_started' THEN difficulty_at_start 
        ELSE NULL 
    END) AS difficulty_at_start,
    SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'hint_requested' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nb_hints_requested,
    SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'hint_shown' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nb_hints_shown,
    CASE
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT event_source) = 1 THEN MAX(event_source)
        ELSE 'mixed'
    END AS event_source,
    MAX(CAST(is_simulated AS INT)) AS is_simulated
FROM [lh_silver].[dbo].[Game_event_clean]
GROUP BY session_id;
